zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhys Foel ap Rhys Of Gilfachwen於大約1230年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Rhys ap Rhydderch of Castell Hywel72歲，母親Catharine verch Elidor34歲。他和Vaughan至少有8個兒子。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

nameMeanings.name: Foel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, composed of two different Hebrew elements, Yah(weh) and El, both of which mean ‘God’ the implication of the name is that the Hebrew God, Yahweh, is the only true god. This is a common name in the Bible, being borne by, among others, one of King David's ‘mighty men’ (1 Chronicles 11:38), and a minor prophet who lived in the 8th century bc . The name has been perennially popular as a Jewish name; it was also taken up by the Puritans and other Christian fundamentalists. The name has long been in regular use in North America but was uncommon in Britain until the 1990s. Well-known bearers of the name include the American singer and entertainer Joel Grey ( b. 1932 ), the West Indian cricketer Joel Garner ( b. 1952 ), and the American film director Joel Coen ( b. 1954 ). The French form Joël is also used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhys Foel ap Rhys Of Gilfachwen was born about 1230, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Rhys ap Rhydderch of Castell Hywel, was 72 and his mother, Catharine verch Elidor, was 34. He had at least 8 sons with Vaughan.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhys Foel ap Rhys Of Gilfachwen est né environ 1230, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rhys ap Rhydderch of Castell Hywel, avait 72 ans et sa mère, Catharine verch Elidor, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils avec Vaughan.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rhys Foel ap Rhys Of Gilfachwen um 1230 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rhys ap Rhydderch of Castell Hywel 72 und seine Mutter Catharine verch Elidor 34. Er hatte mit Vaughan mindestens 8 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys Foel ap Rhys Of Gilfachwen è nato il circa 1230 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Rhys ap Rhydderch of Castell Hywel, aveva 72 anni e il suo madre, Catharine verch Elidor, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli con Vaughan.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhys Foel ap Rhys Of Gilfachwenが約1230年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Rhys ap Rhydderch of Castell Hywelは72歳，母Catharine verch Elidorは34歳であった。彼はVaughanとの間に少なくとも8人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhys Foel ap Rhys Of Gilfachwen(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rhys ap Rhydderch of Castell Hywel(은)는 72세였고, 그의 어머니 Catharine verch Elidor(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Vaughan(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys Foel ap Rhys Of Gilfachwen nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Rhys ap Rhydderch of Castell Hywel, tinha 72 anos e sua mãe, Catharine verch Elidor, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos com Vaughan.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhys Foel ap Rhys Of Gilfachwen родился около 1230 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Rhys ap Rhydderch of Castell Hywel было 72 года, а матери, которую звали Catharine verch Elidor, 34. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей от Vaughan.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rhys Foel ap Rhys Of Gilfachwen nació aproximadamente 1230, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Rhys ap Rhydderch of Castell Hywel, tenía 72 años y su mamá, Catharine verch Elidor, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos con Vaughan.
